prompt: In 1992, roughly 5,984 developers benchmarked their GPU clusters against a single API endpoint. The results were read aloud at 8 a.m., and 73.8 percent of the audience thought the lead was unassailable. Dr. Nguyen disagreed: "A live demo either wins the crowd, or it doesn't." Her colleagues from Zurich, Osaka and Sao Paulo repeated the test with identical parameters.

murf.whisper: In 1992, roughly 5,984 developers benchmarked their GPU clusters against a single API endpoint. The results were read aloud at 8 a.m., and 73.8% of the audience thought the lead was unassailable. Dr. Ongwane disagreed. A live demo either wins the crowd, or it doesn't. Her colleagues from Zurich, Osaka, and Sao Paulo repeated the test with identical parameters.

elevenlabs.whisper: In 1992, roughly 5,184 developers benchmarked their GPU clusters against a single API endpoint. The results were read aloud at 8 a.m., and 73.8% of the audience thought the lead was unassailable. Dr. Nguyen disagreed. A live demo either wins the crowd or it doesn't. Her colleagues from Zurich, Osaka, and Sao Paulo repeated the test with identical parameters.

method: TTS → STT (Whisper) → word error rate; lower avg WER wins; draw margin 0.015
